message:
feat(security): implement RevocationSeal for check-use atomicity [MOR/C1.1]

Add optimistic concurrency control to revocation checks via RevocationSeal,
RevocationDecision, and SealValidation types. check_with_seal() captures
head_seq at check time; validate_seal() detects stale seals where head_seq
has advanced (indicating a potential concurrent revocation). 6 acceptance tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
